name: Wonderful Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 Jars Pureed baby-food prunes (4 1/2 oz each)
1 teaspoon Almond flavoring or butter flavoring
Egg substitute (equal to two whole eggs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, cocoa powder, sugar, baking soda, baking powder, and salt into a large mixing bowl.
2. In a medium bowl, combine buttermilk powder, prunes, flavorings, egg substitute, and water. Mix until well combined.
3. Slowly pour the moist ingredients into the dry mixture, blending well to ensure no lumps remain.
4. Spray two 9-inch round pans or one 9x13-inch rectangular pan with pan spray.
5. Fill the prepared pans with batter and bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. For the orange glaze: Mix 1 cup orange juice with 2 cups powdered sugar. Stir in 2 teaspoons grated orange peel and heat until boiling. Pour over the hot cake while still warm.
Alternatively, mix 1 cup powdered sugar with 4 to 5 tablespoons milk, 1 1/2 teaspoons corn syrup, and 1/4 teaspoon vanilla or bourbon whiskey. Drizzle over the cooled cake.
